title: Bead Beating RNA Extraction from 25 mm Filter
author: Christa Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jx6cpre
materials: Quantify extracted RNA with Nanodrop (2 μl)
Quantify DNased RNA with Nanodrop (2 μl)

steps.title: Turn on 4°C centrifuge
steps.instruction: Turn on 4°C centrifuge

steps.title: Set up 2
steps.instruction: Set up 2.0 ml tube adaptor on Mo Bio Vortex Genie 2.

steps.title: For each sample, prepare a 2
steps.instruction: For each sample, prepare a 2.0 ml tube with the following 3-bead mixture: 200 μl 0.1 mm zirconium beads, 100 μl 0.4-0.6 mm glass beads, 100 μl 0.5 mm zirconium beads undetermined 3-bead mixture by Christa Smith

steps.title: Add Ambion Denaturation Solution to each...
steps.instruction: Add Ambion Denaturation Solution to each tube undetermined Ambion Denaturation Solution Thermo Scientific Catalog #AM8540G

steps.title: To each bead tube, add internal standards to reach ~0
steps.instruction: To each bead tube, add internal standards to reach ~0.5% of expected RNA yield

steps.title: Place one 25 mm sample filter...
steps.instruction: Place one 25 mm sample filter into each bead tube using RNase-free forceps

steps.title: Place sample tubes on vortex adaptor...
steps.instruction: Place sample tubes on vortex adaptor and beat for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Switch tube positions and beat another 5 min
steps.instruction: Switch tube positions and beat another 5 min. 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge sample tubes for 1 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample tubes for 1 min at 5000 rpm at 4°C 00:01:00

steps.title: Transfer as much of the RNA...
steps.instruction: Transfer as much of the RNA lysate as possible to a new 1.5 ml centrifuge tube (Can carryover some beads)

steps.title: Centrifuge RNA tubes for 5 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge RNA tubes for 5 min at 5000 rpm at 4°C 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer lysate to new 2
steps.instruction: Transfer lysate to new 2.0 ml tube (Do not carry over any beads).

steps.title: Add 1 volume of 100% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of 100% ethanol to the lysate undetermined Ethyl alcohol, Pure 200 proof, for molecular biology Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E7023

steps.title: Draw the RNA lysate up into a 3
steps.instruction: Draw the RNA lysate up into a 3.0 ml syringe with a 21g1 gauge needle and pass it back out 8 times to shear RNA

steps.title: Apply 700 μL of RNA lysate...
steps.instruction: Apply 700 μL of RNA lysate to RNeasy mini column RNeasy Mini Kit Qiagen Catalog #74104

steps.title: Close tube gently and centrifuge 15...
steps.instruction: Close tube gently and centrifuge 15 sec at 13000 rpm 00:00:15

steps.title: Repeat steps 16-18 until entire sample...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 16-18 until entire sample has been applied to column.

steps.title: Add 700 μl Buffer RW1 to RNeasy Mini spin column
steps.instruction: Add 700 μl Buffer RW1 to RNeasy Mini spin column. Here we are continuing to following Qiagen RNeasy Mini kit (step5 of Qiagen manual); finishing with two sequential elutions and spins of 35 μ

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 sec at 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 sec at 13000 rpm. Discard the flow-through. 00:00:15

steps.title: Add 500 μl Buffer RPE to RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl Buffer RPE to RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 sec at 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 sec at 13000 rpm. Discard flow-through. 00:00:15

steps.title: Add 500 μl Buffer RPE to RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl Buffer RPE to RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 2 min at 13000 rpm 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 2 min at 13000 rpm 00:02:00

steps.title: Place column in new 2
steps.instruction: Place column in new 2.0 ml collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00

steps.title: Place column in a new 1
steps.instruction: Place column in a new 1.5 ml sterile tube

steps.title: Add 35 μl RNase-free water directly...
steps.instruction: Add 35 μl RNase-free water directly onto filter and close the lid.

steps.title: Incubate tube for 1 min at room temperature 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Incubate tube for 1 min at room temperature 00:01:00

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm. 00:01:00

steps.title: Add another 35 μl RNase-free water into same column/tube
steps.instruction: Add another 35 μl RNase-free water into same column/tube

steps.title: Incubate for 1 min at room temperature 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 min at room temperature 00:01:00

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00

steps.title: Discard column and place tube with RNA on ice
steps.instruction: Discard column and place tube with RNA on ice

steps.title: Mix the following in a 1.5 ml tube
steps.instruction: Mix the following in a 1.5 ml tube: %s %s component amount extracted sample 50 μl RNase-free water 40 μl DNase reaction buffer 10 μl Turbo DNase 3 μl TURBO DNA-free™ Kit Thermo Scientific Catalog #AM1907

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min at 37 °C 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min at 37 °C 00:20:00

steps.title: Add 3 μl more Turbo DNase to sample
steps.instruction: Add 3 μl more Turbo DNase to sample

steps.title: Incubate an additional 20 min at 37 °C 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Incubate an additional 20 min at 37 °C 00:20:00

steps.title: Add 20 μl inactivation solution to...
steps.instruction: Add 20 μl inactivation solution to sample (make sure solution is well mixed)

steps.title: Vortex on and off for ~4 min 00:04:00
steps.instruction: Vortex on and off for ~4 min 00:04:00

steps.title: Spin for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Spin for 1 min at 13000 rpm 00:01:00

steps.title: Carefully, without disturbing inactivation reagent, remove...
steps.instruction: Carefully, without disturbing inactivation reagent, remove supernatant (~100 μl) into a new 1.5 ml tube and place on ice

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Clean and concentrate DNased RNA using Zymo RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 according to manufacturer protocol RNA Clean & Concentrator™-5 Zymo Research Catalog #R1015

steps.title: Store RNA at -80 °C
steps.instruction: Store RNA at -80 °C
